codeline.highlight: scale(Ta,view<const T, Abi, OB>B,view<T, Abi, OC>C){
hadamard(view<const T, Abi, OA>A,view<const T, Abi, OB>B,
clamp(view<const T, Abi, O>x,view<const T, Abi, O>lo,
view<const T, Abi, O>hi,view<T, Abi, O>z){
clamp(view<const T, Abi, O>x,Tlo,Thi,view<T, Abi, O>z){
clamp_resid(view<const T, Abi, O>x,view<const T, Abi, O>lo,
view<const T, Abi, O>hi,view<T, Abi, O>z){
negate(view<const T, Abi, OA>A,view<T, Abi, OB>B){
sub(view<const T, Abi, OA>A,view<const T, Abi, OB>B,view<T, Abi, OC>C){
add(view<const T, Abi, OA>A,view<const T, Abi, OB>B,view<T, Abi, OC>C){
